scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/ui" "npm run dev -w packages/desktop"
scripts.dev:web: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/ui" "npm run dev -w packages/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/ui && docker build -t yourname/my-app .
